symptoms: Infer attempt without escalated network access repeatedly failed DNS resolution for huggingface.co HEAD requests.
The same isolated environment had already passed import and load, which ruled out missing Python dependencies.

evidence.details: The first infer attempt hit repeated NameResolutionError errors for config.json, generation_config.json, custom_generate/generate.py, and processor_config.json.
Weights were already cached locally, so the failure was due to runtime lookups in a network-restricted execution context rather than missing base weights.

resolution: Retry infer with approved network access so the auxiliary Hugging Face lookups can complete.
